title: Cutting With Style - Cut All Stonecutter
description: Ever felt like the stonecutter was just too slow?, Not Any More! No longer spend meaningless hours just to get one type of block
body:
Ever felt like the stonecutter was just too slow?, Not Any More! No longer spend meaningless hours just to get one type of block

Features:

- Adds a button to instantly Cut All items of matching id's to speed up that lengthy process.
- Cost is widely Configuarable!, simply pick Hunger, Xp, Or None if you wish for the less costly approach.
- Highlights the blocks that would be cut in inventory, Dont want to be cutting something you dont want...

Updates will progress so long as I remember to do so
